title: Meet Alistair Brownlee at Cyclist Track Day in Leeds
content:
Cyclist
Meet Alistair Brownlee at Cyclist Track Day in Leeds

You read that right. Two-time Olympic gold medallist in triathlon and co-founder of truefuels Alistair Brownlee will be joining us at the Cyclist Track Days event at Leeds’s Brownlee Centre (cool, right?) on 6th June.

Even better, if you use code BROWNLEE you can get 15% off tickets for the day of testing bikes – and checking out truefuels.

Get your tickets here, quick.

The post Meet Alistair Brownlee at Cyclist Track Day in Leeds appeared first on Cyclist.
author: Will Strickson | Website Editor
